title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAMES OF CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GOA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2857 / 55 OG No. 40, 8446 (October 5, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2599, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAMES OF CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF GOA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES SUR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The names of the barrios of Balaynan and Aroro in the Municipality of Goa, Province of Camarines Sur, are changed to San Rafael and San Pedro, respectively.

SEC 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
